chain.thought: Explanation: Comparing the tenures, Anders Theil served from 7 November 2005 to 7 July 2009 (about 3 years and 8 months), which is longer than other listed tenures such as Johnny Petersen (about 3 years and 5 months) and Ebbe Skovdahl (about 2 years and 1 month). Therefore, Anders Theil held the position the longest.
